texto: I kind of feel like we're all humans; we all live on this planet. I kind of always wish there was more of a partnership - a really healthy relationship between people, working together to do things and make it good and change.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Robert Coppola Schwartzman: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “I kind of feel like we're all humans; we all live on this planet. I kind of always wish there was…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, change, good pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e trabalho.
